name: daily-readings
title: Daily Temperature and Precipitation Readings
description:
Daily summary observations from each station.

Note: readings before 2010-01-01 were collected using an older instrument calibration standard and may differ systematically by 0.3–0.5 °C from post-2010 readings. Do not combine pre- and post-2010 data in a single analysis without applying the calibration correction described in the methodology notes.

fields.name: station_id
fields.description: References stations.station_id. Every reading must belong to a known station.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Calendar date of the observation (local time at the station).

fields.name: temp_min_c
fields.description: Minimum air temperature recorded during the 24-hour calendar day.

fields.name: temp_max_c
fields.description: Maximum air temperature recorded during the 24-hour calendar day.

fields.name: precipitation_mm
fields.description: Total liquid-equivalent precipitation accumulated during the calendar day.
fields.warning: Null values indicate the station did not report precipitation for that day — not zero precipitation. Do not substitute 0 for null in analysis. A value of 0.0 means the station reported and confirmed trace or no precipitation.

fields.name: wind_speed_avg_ms
fields.description: Average wind speed over the calendar day.
